speaker: seller

args.message: Welcome! Come on in and check out this gorgeous 2018 Toyota Prius Two. Averaging over 50 miles per gallon, this beauty is your ticket to saving big at the pump. With a clean history and Toyota's legendary reliability, it's the perfect commuter car. You won't find a better deal on a hybrid that runs this smoothly!
